info.title: Formo API
info.description: API for managing form webhook subscriptions, form responses, and event tracking

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token for authentication. Use an SDK Write Key for the Events API, or a Workspace API Key for the Query and Profile APIs. Format: 'Bearer <token>'

user_agent.description: The user agent of the device

locale.description: Language of the device (e.g., en-US, en-GB)

location.description: Geographic location country code (e.g., US, NG)

referrer.description: The referrer URL where the user came from

page_url.description: Full URL of the current page

library_name.description: Name of the SDK used (e.g., Formo Web SDK)

browser.description: Name of the browser (e.g., chrome, firefox, safari)

screen_width.description: Width of the device screen in pixels

screen_height.description: Height of the device screen in pixels

screen_density.description: Pixel density of the device screen (devicePixelRatio)

viewport_width.description: Width of the browser viewport in pixels

viewport_height.description: Height of the browser viewport in pixels

EventProperties.description: Event-specific properties. Can contain any key-value pairs relevant to the event.

event.description: Name of the event (for track events)

original_timestamp.description: Time when the event occurred on the client

sent_at.description: Time when the event was sent from the client

balance_usd.description: Balance in USD for this app

balance.description: Token balance (as string to preserve precision)

first_seen.description: First seen timestamp (ISO 8601). Engagement fields (first_seen through activity_dates) are omitted entirely when no tracked data exists for the profile.

lifecycle.description: User lifecycle stage based on activity patterns. Only returned by the Search Profiles endpoint.

chains.description: Array of per-chain wallet data (only included when expand=chains)

labels.description: Array of wallet labels (only included when expand=labels)

apps.description: Array of wallet apps (only included when expand=apps)

tokens.description: Array of wallet tokens (only included when expand=tokens)

data.description: Array of wallet profiles matching the search criteria

total.description: Total number of profiles matching the criteria (before pagination)

limit.description: Maximum number of profiles returned in this response

data.description: Rows returned by the SQL query

FilterCondition.description: A single filter condition for the profile search

field.description:
The field path to filter on. Supported formats:
- User fields: `users.{attribute}` (e.g., `users.net_worth_usd`, `users.device`, `users.lifecycle`)
- Social fields: `users.{social}` (e.g., `users.ens`, `users.farcaster`)
- Chain filters: `chains.balance` (any chain) or `chains.{chain_id}.balance` (specific chain)
- App filters: `apps.{app_id}.balance` (any chain) or `apps.{chain_id}.{app_id}.balance` (specific chain)
- Token filters: `tokens.{address}.balance` (any chain) or `tokens.{chain_id}.{address}.balance` (specific chain)
- Label filters: `labels.{tag_id}` (e.g., `labels.coinbase.verified_account`)

op.description:
The comparison operator:
- `eq`: Equals
- `neq`: Not equals
- `gt`: Greater than
- `gte`: Greater than or equal
- `lt`: Less than
- `lte`: Less than or equal
- `in`: Value is in array
- `nin`: Value is not in array

value.description: The value to compare against. Use arrays for `in` and `nin` operators.

scope.description: Only for token filters. `any` (default) matches holdings in wallet or any protocol. `protocol` matches only tokens deposited in DeFi protocols (use with `appId` to target a specific protocol).

appId.description: Only for token filters with `scope: "protocol"`. The DeFi protocol ID to filter by (e.g., `aave-v3`, `compound-v3`, `uniswap-v3`, `lido`).

ProfileFilter.description: Filter configuration for searching wallet profiles

conditions.description: Array of filter conditions to apply

logic.description: How to combine multiple conditions: `and` (all must match) or `or` (any must match)

get.description: Retrieves recent form responses with transformed field data

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form

400.description: Bad Request - Form ID is required

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

post.description: Creates a new webhook subscription for form events

formId.description: The unique identifier of the form

targetUrl.description: The URL that will receive webhook events

eventTypes.description: Types of events to subscribe to

200.description: Webhook already exists for this form and URL. New event types were merged with existing ones.

webhookId.description: Unique identifier of the webhook subscription
Unique identifier of the newly created webhook subscription

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required fields, invalid event types, or webhook with identical event types already exists

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription

parameters.name: targetUrl
parameters.description: The URL that receives webhook events

400.description: Bad Request - Must provide either webhookId or targetUrl query parameter

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

post.description: Sends an event to the Formo Events API. Use the SDK Write Key from your project settings as the Bearer token for authentication.

context.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/143.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

quarantined_rows.description: Number of events that failed validation and were quarantined

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid Bearer token

post.description: Executes a read-only SQL query against your project data. Requires a Workspace API Key with `query:read` permission. The API key must be included in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Queries must be single SELECT/WITH statements, without comments or multiple statements, and must include a LIMIT that is less than or equal to 1000.

query.description: SQL query to execute. Must be read-only (SELECT/WITH), single statement, no comments, and include LIMIT <= 1000.

400.description: Bad Request - Query missing/invalid or limit over 1000

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden - API key does not have query:read permission

example.message: API key does not have query:read permission

404.description: Not Found - Project ID or read token not found

error.message: Project id or read token not found

500.description: Server Error - Failed to perform SQL query

post.description: Search and filter wallet profiles with pagination support. Returns a paginated list of wallet profiles matching the specified criteria. Supports advanced filtering by user data, on-chain activity, chains, apps, tokens, labels, and lifecycle. Requires a Workspace API Key with `profiles:read` permission. The API key must be included in the Authorization header as a Bearer token.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Filter by specific wallet address (exact match)

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional data to include in each profile. Valid options: apps, chains, tokens, labels. Example: expand=apps,chains

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field to sort results by. Default: last_onchain

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of profiles to return. Default: 100, Maximum: 1000

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of profiles to skip for pagination. Default: 0

appFilter.summary: Find users with Uniswap or Aave activity

tokenProtocolFilter.summary: Find users with USDC deposited in Aave V3

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid query parameters or malformed request body

error.message: Invalid operator. Must be one of: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing authorization header, invalid header format, or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden - API key does not have profiles:read permission

example.message: API key does not have profiles:read permission

500.description: Server Error - Failed to fetch wallet profile data

error.message: Failed to fetch wallet profile data

get.description: Retrieves wallet profile information for a given address. Returns comprehensive profile data including wallet properties, labels, tokens, and apps. Requires a Workspace API Key with `profiles:read` permission. The API key must be included in the Authorization header as a Bearer token.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional data to include in the response. Valid options: apps, chains, tokens, labels. Example: expand=apps,chains,tokens,labels

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid wallet address format

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing authorization header, invalid header format, or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden - API key does not have profiles:read permission

example.message: API key does not have profiles:read permission

404.description: Not Found - Wallet profile not found

500.description: Server Error - Failed to fetch wallet profile data

error.message: Failed to fetch wallet profile data
